summary: Add MaxRate=10.0 hard cap in AdaptiveLimiter.OnSuccess() so a long success streak before the first 429 cannot push the rate past a sane outbound ceiling.
reason: Greptile P2 finding on PR #444 (ratelimit.go:59-74). Without a 429, OnSuccess multiplies by 1.25 indefinitely, reaching ~16 req/s after ~100 successes.
